name: NetBrands Corp.
business: NetBrands Corp. is a blockchain infrastructure company focused on cryptocurrency mining, digital asset treasury (DAT) management, and related blockchain technology initiatives. It currently mines Bitcoin and other cryptocurrencies using ASIC miners hosted at a facility in Cedar Falls, Iowa. The company also plans to develop a 5-megawatt Bitcoin mining facility and establish a layered digital asset treasury holding Bitcoin, Ethereum, and AAVE.

exposures.sentence: On July 15, 2025, the Company announced that it had pivoted to become a blockchain infrastructure business focused on cryptocurrency mining, digital asset treasury (DAT) management, and related blockchain technology initiatives.
The Company announced plans to establish layered digital asset treasury targeting Bitcoin, Ethereum and AAVE as a long-term reserve assets.

On July 15, 2025, the Company announced that it had pivoted to become a blockchain infrastructure business focused on cryptocurrency mining, digital asset treasury (DAT) management, and related blockchain technology initiatives.

catalysts.event: Purchased 10 ASIC miners consisting of Bitmain S21+
catalysts.sentence: The Company purchased 10 ASIC miners consisting of Bitmain S21+ on July 17, 2025.

catalysts.event: Signed hosting agreement with Simple Mining LLC
catalysts.sentence: Following the purchase of the initial batch of ASIC miners, the Company announced on July 22, 2025, that it had signed a hosting agreement with Simple Mining LLC to host its fleet of miners.

catalysts.event: All miners plugged in and hashing at full capacity
catalysts.sentence: As of July 30, 2025, all miners were plugged in and hashing at full capacity.

catalysts.event: Purchased additional 10 ASICs consisting of Bitmain L9 Scrypt Miners
catalysts.sentence: The Company purchased additional 10 ASICs consisting of Bitmain L9 Scrypt Miners on November 19 th . 2025 rounding up its hybrid fleet to 20 ASICs.
